problem id: ab104009
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  00100111 -> 11110001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10100101 -> 01000001
  00001011 -> 10011010
  01001011 -> 10001010
  11111011 -> 00100110
  11110111 -> 01000101
  11000001 -> 01111000

query: 10000110
predicted answer: 10010001
